title: dalea daucosma
intro: Dalea daucosma, also known as Dalea purpurea var. daucosma, is a perennial plant in the pea family (Fabaceae) that is native to North America. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, particularly for its antispasmodic and expectorant properties, which help to relieve coughs and respiratory issues. The health benefits of Dalea daucosma include its potential to soothe digestive issues, reduce inflammation, and promote relaxation. Dalea daucosma is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, and can also be found in some commercial herbal supplements and medications.
